title: Dialogue Personality Implantation Lifecycle

gates.name: Lifecycle loop runs end-to-end
gates.evidence: implant_personality() drives observe->decision->integrate->verify->sleep and emits state/snapshot artifacts.

gates.name: Critical bug fixes landed
gates.evidence: free_energy_after is now wired from decision result; maturity report threshold/window uses config-consistent values.

gates.name: Data robustness baseline
gates.evidence: DialogueWorld now guards integer parsing and malformed payload test passes.

gates.name: Real exported user replay
gates.evidence: A real export was used from data/m50_output/users and anonymized before ingestion. Acceptance run reached matured=true with three sleep snapshots.

findings.summary: Prediction bridge still uses static confidence/horizon and one-step expected state copy, which is concept-heavy scaffolding.
Signal extraction remains rule/keyword based and lacks calibration against real corpora.
Replay is inbound-only (counterpart turns), so full turn-taking dynamics are not modeled.

residual_risks: Heuristic extractors can drift on domain/language shift and have no calibration guardrail in M5.2.
next_actions_before_full_accept: Add one regression test using a real anonymized user export fixture.
Define acceptance thresholds for minimum ticks/sleeps and expected maturity behavior by cohort.
